name: Sliding Leg Curl
resistance_profile: Bodyweight leverage rises as the legs extend, loading the hamstrings hardest near full extension (long muscle length).
cues: Lie on your back, heels on a towel or sliders, hips bridged up
Slide your heels away until your legs are almost straight
Pull your heels back toward you while keeping the hips high
common_errors: Letting the hips drop to the floor mid-rep
Sliding out further than you can pull back with control
